requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Guinea National Conformity, EDG, and Project Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——几内亚国家合格评定、EDG和项目采购
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——幾內亞國家合格評定、EDG和項目採購

summary.en: A public Guinea solar-inverter-specific compulsory safety standard list could not be confirmed. The standards-body name IGNM (Institut Guinéen de Normalisation et de Métrologie) is used in secondary and government-context references but should be reconfirmed with Guinea authorities for the current conformity route. For bankable PV projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 remain the most defensible safety evidence for PV power converters and inverters, especially where EDG, lenders, donors, EPC contractors, or mining customers specify IEC certificates. Safety evidence should cover the exact model or family, firmware/hardware configuration, environmental rating, French or bilingual warnings, and installation manuals suitable for humid tropical and dusty operating conditions.
summary.zh: 未能确认公开的几内亚太阳能逆变器专门强制安全标准清单。标准机构名称IGNM（Institut Guinéen de Normalisation et de Métrologie）见于二级和政府语境资料，但现行合格评定路径应向几内亚主管机关重新确认。对于可融资光伏项目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2仍是光伏功率变换器和逆变器最稳妥的安全证据，尤其是在EDG、贷款方、捐助方、EPC承包商或矿业客户指定IEC证书时。安全证据应覆盖确切型号或系列、固件/硬件配置、环境等级、法语或双语警示，以及适合湿热和多尘运行条件的安装手册。
summary.zht: 未能確認公開的幾內亞太陽能逆變器專門強制安全標準清單。標準機構名稱IGNM（Institut Guinéen de Normalisation et de Métrologie）見於二級和政府語境資料，但現行合格評定路徑應向幾內亞主管機關重新確認。對於可融資光伏項目，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2仍是光伏功率轉換器和逆變器最穩妥的安全證據，尤其是在EDG、貸款方、捐助方、EPC承包商或礦業客戶指定IEC證書時。安全證據應覆蓋確切型號或系列、韌體/硬體配置、環境等級、法語或雙語警示，以及適合濕熱和多塵運行條件的安裝手冊。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Guinea national conformity route through IGNM or competent authority (current inverter-specific compulsory list not confirmed)
Project-specific EDG, EPC, lender, donor, mining customer, or owner safety documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 test reports, voluntary CQC or CGC certificates, CNAS laboratory reports, and China-market markings and manuals. These documents may be useful technical inputs but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or Guinea national conformity acceptance. Chinese manuals, labels, and warnings may also need French or bilingual adaptation for Guinea procurement and installation use.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004测试报告、自愿性CQC或CGC证书、CNAS实验室报告，以及中国市场标识和手册。上述文件可作为有用技术输入，但不会自动等同于IEC 62109-1/-2证书或几内亚国家合格评定接受。中国手册、标签和警示也可能需要为几内亚采购和安装使用改为法语或双语。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004測試報告、自願性CQC或CGC證書、CNAS實驗室報告，以及中國市場標識和手冊。上述文件可作為有用技術輸入，但不會自動等同於IEC 62109-1/-2證書或幾內亞國家合格評定接受。中國手冊、標籤和警示也可能需要為幾內亞採購和安裝使用改為法語或雙語。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
Voluntary CQC/CGC PV inverter certification routes based on China domestic requirements

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T safety reports do not by themselves satisfy IEC 62109 or Guinea project procurement expectations. Exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model or family, plus a declaration mapping Chinese reports to IEC clauses where available. The technical file should address tropical humidity, enclosure ingress protection, corrosion, surge protection, earthing, DC isolation, arc-fault / fire-risk controls where specified, spare parts, and French or bilingual installation and safety instructions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T安全报告本身不能满足IEC 62109或几内亚项目采购预期。出口商应针对特定逆变器型号或系列准备ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书，并在可行处提供将中国报告映射至IEC条款的声明。技术文件应覆盖热带湿度、外壳防护等级、腐蚀、防雷浪涌保护、接地、直流隔离、在被要求时的电弧故障/火灾风险控制、备件，以及法语或双语安装和安全说明。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T安全報告本身不能滿足IEC 62109或幾內亞項目採購預期。出口商應針對特定逆變器型號或系列準備ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書，並在可行處提供將中國報告映射至IEC條款的聲明。技術文件應覆蓋熱帶濕度、外殼防護等級、腐蝕、防雷浪湧保護、接地、直流隔離、在被要求時的電弧故障/火災風險控制、備件，以及法語或雙語安裝和安全說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where imposed by Guinea national conformity review, EDG, EPC, donor, lender, owner, mining customer, or procurement specification; public inverter-specific compulsory list not confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven for China domestic certification; GB/T evidence is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Guinea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-only GB/T safety file should be treated as incomplete for Guinea PV inverter projects unless the buyer and competent authority expressly accept it. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence, French or bilingual safety documentation, and tropical-environment design evidence for the exact model supplied. Verify the current IGNM or competent-authority conformity route and any EDG or donor safety clauses before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非买方和主管机关明确接受，仅有中国GB/T安全文件应视为几内亚光伏逆变器项目的不完整资料。请针对所供确切型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2证据、法语或双语安全文件及热带环境设计证据。出货前请核实现行IGNM或主管机关合格评定路径，以及任何EDG或捐助方安全条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非買方和主管機關明確接受，僅有中國GB/T安全文件應視為幾內亞光伏逆變器項目的不完整資料。請針對所供確切型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2證據、法語或雙語安全文件及熱帶環境設計證據。出貨前請核實現行IGNM或主管機關合格評定路徑，以及任何EDG或捐助方安全條款。
